hero.label: THE GENESIS COLLECTION
hero.subtext: Explore our best products to find what you want, there you will definitely find it.

cards.title: Movement: Swiss Caliber 101.

cards.description: Engineered for extreme durability and featherlight build.

cards.title: Crystal: Double-domed Anti-reflective Sapphire.

craftsmanship.label: HERITAGE & ENGINEERING
craftsmanship.body_text: Every LEXOM timepiece stems from an obsession with mechanical perfection. We bridge the gap between heavy industrial power and refined, modern luxury aesthetics for a new generation of collectors.
